wizard.paused: Paused — need exactly one target visible
wizard.no_target: No target detected. Make sure you are visible to the sensor.
wizard.multiple_targets: Multiple targets detected. Only one person should be in the room during calibration.
wizard.save_prompt: Click Save to store this room's calibration, or click a corner above to re-mark it.
wizard.walk_instruction_full: Walk to each corner in order (1 → 2 → 3 → 4) and click Mark. Stand still for a few seconds so the sensor can lock on.
wizard.cant_reach: Can't reach a corner? Stand as close as you can and enter the distance from each wall in the offset fields — like corner 4 in the diagram above, where a plant is in the way.
wizard.corner_sensor_hint: Corner 2 is where your sensor is mounted. You can stand right under it.
wizard.walk_instruction: Walk to each corner of the room and click Mark. The sensor will record your position over {duration} seconds.
wizard.mount_height_desc: Place the sensor 1.5 to 2 meters from the floor
wizard.placement_desc: Place in a corner or on a wall, pointing toward the most distant opposite corner
wizard.beam_direction_desc: Keep the beam horizontal — not angled up or down

dialogs.delete_calibration_body: This will also delete all detection zones and furniture. This cannot be undone.
dialogs.unsaved_changes_body: Your changes will be lost if you navigate away without applying.
dialogs.update_entity_ids_body: Zone names changed. Would you like to update the entity IDs to match?

info.occupancy: Combined occupancy from all sources — PIR motion, static mmWave presence, and zone tracking. Shows detected if any source detects presence.
info.static_presence: mmWave radar detects stationary people by measuring micro-movements like breathing. Works through furniture and blankets.
info.motion_presence: Passive infrared sensor detects movement by sensing body heat. Fast response but only triggers on motion, not stationary presence.
info.target_presence: Whether any target is actively tracked by the mmWave radar. Detected when at least one target point is being reported.
info.zone_occupancy: Zone {slot} occupancy. Currently {count} {count, plural, one {target} other {targets}} detected. Sensitivity determines how many consecutive frames are needed to confirm presence.
info.rest_of_room_occupancy: Covers the entire room outside of any defined zones. Currently {count} {count, plural, one {target} other {targets}} detected.
info.target_auto_range: Automatically set max distance from room dimensions.
info.target_max_distance: Maximum detection distance for the target sensor (LD2450). Hardware limit: 6m.
info.static_min_distance: Minimum detection distance for the static sensor.
info.static_max_distance: Maximum detection distance for the static sensor. Hardware limit: 16m.
info.motion_timeout: Time after last motion before the motion sensor clears.
info.static_timeout: Time after last static detection before the sensor clears.
info.trigger_threshold: Minimum signal strength needed to initially detect static presence. Higher = harder to trigger.
info.renew_threshold: Minimum signal strength needed to maintain static presence detection. Higher = harder to renew.
info.illuminance_offset: Adjust the illuminance reading by a fixed amount.
info.humidity_offset: Adjust the humidity reading by a fixed amount.
info.temperature_offset: Adjust the temperature reading by a fixed amount.
info.room_occupancy: Combined room occupancy from all sensors.
info.room_target_presence: Whether any target is actively tracked.
info.room_target_count: Number of targets detected in the room.
info.zone_presence: Per-zone occupancy based on target tracking.
info.zone_target_count: Number of targets in each zone.
info.xy_sensor: Raw XY coordinates from the sensor.
info.xy_grid: XY coordinates mapped to the room grid.
info.active: Whether each target slot is actively tracking.
info.distance: Distance from sensor to each target.
info.angle: Angle from sensor to each target.
